div1.entryFree:
Traverse, vb. a military word of command, == march, go on: hold, Wart, t.; thus, thus, thus, H4B III, 2, 291. t., go, provide thy money, Oth. I, 3, 378.
Used of fencing, probably == to make a thrust: to see thee fight, to see thee foin, to see thee t. Wiv. II, 3, 25 (the host's speech).
